name: three-provinces-six-ministries
description: 三省六部 Agent 系统 - 基于 Claude Code 自迭代机制

scripts.cost:status: ts-node -e "import {costTracker} from './agents/cost/tracker'; const data = costTracker.exportData(); console.log(JSON.stringify(data, null, 2))"
scripts.cost:reset: ts-node -e "import {costTracker} from './agents/cost/tracker'; costTracker.clearHistory(); console.log('✅ 成本记录已清除')"
scripts.rebuild: npm run clean && npm run build
